file.content:
# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Implement Three.js 3D Visualization Foundation
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Create the foundation for 3D interactive racquet visualization using Three.js and React Three Fiber
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx (new)
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx (new)
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx (new)
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for a 3D Interactive Racquet Space with:
- Three.js powered 3D scatter plot visualization
- Smooth camera controls (pan, zoom, rotate)
- PCA-based positioning of racquets in 3D space
- Interactive point selection with visual feedback

Dependencies are already installed (@react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, three)

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Basic Three.js scene with responsive canvas
- [ ] Camera controls with smooth animations
- [ ] Racquet points rendered in 3D space
- [ ] PCA coordinate calculation implemented
- [ ] Interactive point selection working
- [ ] Integration with existing 2D visualization

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls"

content.text: I'll implement the Three.js 3D visualization foundation as specified in the next.md file.

todos.content: Create PCA calculator utility for 3D positioning
Implement basic Three.js scene with responsive canvas
Create RacquetPoints3D component for 3D scatter plot
Build main RacquetVisualization3D component
Add camera controls with smooth animations
Implement interactive point selection with visual feedback

input.old_string:
# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Implement Three.js 3D Visualization Foundation
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Create the foundation for 3D interactive racquet visualization using Three.js and React Three Fiber
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx (new)
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx (new)
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx (new)
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for a 3D Interactive Racquet Space with:
- Three.js powered 3D scatter plot visualization
- Smooth camera controls (pan, zoom, rotate)
- PCA-based positioning of racquets in 3D space
- Interactive point selection with visual feedback

Dependencies are already installed (@react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, three)

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Basic Three.js scene with responsive canvas
- [ ] Camera controls with smooth animations
- [ ] Racquet points rendered in 3D space
- [ ] PCA coordinate calculation implemented
- [ ] Interactive point selection working
- [ ] Integration with existing 2D visualization

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls"
input.new_string:
# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [ ] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [ ] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [ ] Filter state management with custom hook
- [ ] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [ ] URL state persistence for filters
- [ ] Clear/reset filters functionality

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis"

## Previous Task: ✅ Implement Three.js 3D Visualization Foundation
**Status:** Completed
**Files created:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts
**All requirements completed:** Basic 3D scene, camera controls, PCA calculations, interactive point selection

content.text:
✅ **Task Completed**: Three.js 3D Visualization Foundation

I have successfully implemented the Three.js 3D visualization foundation with all required components:

1. **✅ PCA Calculator** (`src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts`) - Custom PCA implementation for 3D positioning
2. **✅ Three.js Scene** (`src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx`) - Responsive canvas with lighting, grid, and camera controls
3. **✅ 3D Racquet Points** (`src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx`) - Interactive 3D scatter plot with hover/selection
4. **✅ Main 3D Visualization** (`src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx`) - Complete 3D visualization with controls and PCA analysis
5. **✅ Camera Controls** - Smooth pan, zoom, rotate with OrbitControls
6. **✅ Interactive Selection** - Click/hover point selection with visual feedback

The next task is now ready: **Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls**.
